## Summary

Describe the behavior and security boundaries changed by this pull request.

## Verification

- [ ] Relevant tests and static checks pass.
- [ ] New dependencies are necessary, locked, and reviewed.
- [ ] No credentials, tokens, private keys, customer data, or production logs are included.
- [ ] Authentication, authorization, billing, pairing, preview, or deployment changes include negative tests.
- [ ] Migrations are additive or have a rehearsed rollback and backup plan.
- [ ] Security-sensitive rollout flags fail closed and have an owner and retirement date.

## Release Impact

- [ ] No production configuration or credential changes are required.
- [ ] Required configuration changes are documented without secret values.
- [ ] A native/store binary is required.
- [ ] Independent security review or penetration-test retesting is required.
